raw_consumer_statement: Was charged {$19.00} from XXXX and did not make these purchases.Filed a complaint with Citibank and received the detailed report. They did not back my complaint and when i received the report that was provided by XXXX through Citibank, it showed my name and address, BUT the email listed and phone number were NOT mine. Also noteworthy : I do not have any domain names at all! I am especially unhappy as i have been a loyal customer for over 30 years, and have always paid on time ( my credit score is XXXX )
